title: The Tea Party Falls Apart
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Perospero, Judge, Caesar Clown, Unknown person #3 as The tea party collapses into chaos as the alliance tries to flee Big Mom’s territory.
scene: The assassination plan fails and the wedding becomes a desperate escape from a collapsing battlefield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just make it over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Casaar holds the crew's hopes and dreams, literally!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's all I'm thinkin' about, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can make it over that wall, we're home free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: to the other side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Perarin

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: Candy Wall!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAASH! That's it! This is the end! fare- well, cruel world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: BLACKINX

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We did it! He's through the candy wall!

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Atta Boys, Germa!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Go, Caesar! You're still a scumbag, though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Oh, my...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not time to go up to those pearly gates yet!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I make it over that wall, I'm a free man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: T- The treasure of the sea floor...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The tamatebako... even though I can see it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why in the world did it have to fall to such an inconvenient location?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: SH- SHOULD I JUST JUMP DOWN?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what are you going to do with that Tamatebako, du field?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Woagh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stussy! So you were watching me?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AAAA GGGHA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: OWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOWOW...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I landed where I wanted to. Now time to look inside this thing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just how valuable-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Flying Shigan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The world government will be taking that TAMATebako,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: My dumb, dead friend.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we'll have you take the blame and the fall, of course!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 31 dialogue beats. The alliance survives the failed tea party by turning the chaos into a retreat.
